title: Senior Financial Analyst - Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Jaipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions:
Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions!
